key_decisions.original_text: EIP-7688 (progressive containers) targeted for devnet-7; not DFI'd; revisit if devnet-6 instability warrants it
EIP-8080 (consolidation-based exits) DFI'd from Glamsterdam; authors may re-propose for Hegota
ePBS circuit breakers should track missing payloads (not beacon blocks); no standardization required, client-specific implementations acceptable
key_decisions.context: track missing payloads not beacon blocks; client-specific implementations acceptable
